summary: Verified US-842 default-component regression scope against the epic goal, fixed Sochi MVP agreement profile, PERSONAL-STD-063 reverse-engineering evidence, PERSONAL-REQ-1755 through PERSONAL-REQ-1757, and PERSONAL-AC-2422 through PERSONAL-AC-2423. Dependency reports PERSONAL-TASK-1140 attempt-2 and PERSONAL-TASK-1141 through PERSONAL-TASK-1144 attempt-1 were present and successful. Current source/test inspection and local verification confirmed coverage for fixed profile rules, all required phases, legal actions, all-pass, misere, whist/check/half-whist, trick winner, next lead, settlement, next-deal transition, accessibility, visual desktop review, persistence compatibility, and release readiness for the local static frontend/domain app. No backend or live API applies to this project scope.

tests_run.evidence: Vitest passed src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts: 1 file, 5 tests. Covered all-pass through settlement/next-deal, misere through settlement, contract order/widow/discard/whist into play, third-card trick resolution, and rendered human legal-action projection.
Vitest passed 11 files / 101 tests, then tsc and vite build completed successfully. Build output included dist/index.html, CSS, and JS assets.

package_scripts.verify: npm run test && npm run build

verification_environment.notes: No backend service, live API, authentication scope, middleware, route wiring, or persistence server applies. Evidence is local domain/unit/integration/jsdom/browser-fixture evidence for a static Vite app using browser localStorage.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Dependency report review is not counted alone as live coverage; it was supplemented by current source inspection and local command reruns.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Automated tests are local deterministic Vitest/jsdom tests, not a live browser playthrough of an entire bullet.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No backend/live API risk applies. Full-bullet smoke breadth belongs to US-846; US-842 component regression was covered by focused rule-flow integration plus full verify.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Evidence is source/jsdom accessibility verification for native buttons, labels, aria-pressed, focus-visible styling, and suppression of AI/finished controls; no external screen-reader run was performed.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No blocking accessibility risk remains for the US-842 component gate.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Visual evidence is deterministic desktop 1280x800 fixture screenshots for key US-842 phases; full mobile adaptation is explicitly out of MVP scope.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Desktop-first visual coverage is acceptable for this release scope.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Migration evidence is for browser localStorage schema/state compatibility only; no database or server persistence exists.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Legacy pre-rule-engine saves without bulletTarget default to bulletTarget 10 because the old payload did not carry that field; this is documented in PERSONAL-TASK-1140 and is non-blocking.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: The app has no server, accounts, online multiplayer, authorization, tenant scope, or live API mutation path.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No security gate applies beyond local static-app behavior.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: npm run verify; dependency reports PERSONAL-TASK-1140 through PERSONAL-TASK-1144
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No feature flag or backend rollback exists for the static local MVP. Release readiness is based on green tests/build and documented accepted scope limits.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: Static app release has no server rollback path; green production build is acceptable for this component verification.

quality_gate_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 desktop-first static browser scope; source inspection
quality_gate_matrix.limitations: No production logging, metrics, tracing, or operator surface is in MVP scope.
quality_gate_matrix.accepted_risk: No observability requirement applies to this local static rules-engine regression task.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Implementation claims trace to reverse-engineering evidence or explicit MVP agreement decisions
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: Spexus epic hierarchy for PERSONAL-EP-180; src/domain/rules.ts; task-reports/PERSONAL-TASK-1140/attempt-2.json through PERSONAL-TASK-1144/attempt-1.json
evidence_matrix.limitations: The MVP intentionally implements a fixed classic Sochi profile rather than exact DOS emulation. The verified fixed-profile decisions are six-spades no mandatory whist, ten-level check, half-responsible whist, progressive all-pass, all-pass exit by six-level game, game contracts, all-pass, and misere.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Fixed Sochi agreement profile legal behavior
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify; src/domain/rules.ts; src/domain/engine.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Evidence is local domain/integration test coverage. It verifies MVP profile behavior, not every historical DOS agreement variant.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Required phases and transitions: bidding, all-pass, contract order, widow pickup, discard, whist, half-whist, pass, trick play, misere, deal settlement, next-deal transition, bullet completion
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify; src/domain/engine.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: The focused integration test covers representative deterministic flows; engine/unit tests and full verify provide broader transition coverage including bullet completion.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Third-card trick winner, trick count mutation, cleared trick, and next lead
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify; src/domain/engine.ts applyPlayAction/determineTrickWinner
evidence_matrix.limitations: Trick evidence is deterministic local rules-engine execution; no network/live path applies.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Only legal actions are exposed for supported game phases
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify; src/ui/render.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Renderer projection is verified in jsdom and dependency visual fixtures; it is not a full manual play session in a production browser build.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Completed trick records winner, updates trick counts, clears current trick, and makes winner the next leader
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm run test -- src/test/ruleFlow.integration.test.ts; npm run verify; src/domain/engine.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: Covered through deterministic card fixtures and rules-engine state assertions.

evidence_matrix.command_or_source: PERSONAL-EP-180 scope; package.json; source tree inspection
evidence_matrix.limitations: No backend, accounts, online multiplayer, server persistence, authorization, or API route wiring exists in this app. Therefore live_api/live_browser backend evidence is not applicable.
